name: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter, baking chocolate, and sugar in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Beat the mixture until smooth, then allow it to cool slightly.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift flour and salt into the batter.
5. Stir in vanilla and chopped nuts.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased 7 x 11-inch pan.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until set.
8. Allow to cool completely before sifting powdered sugar over the top.
9. Cut into squares immediately after cooling.
Makes 24 brownies.
